author: bigbag
name: Record: 10L LoRA TTT 6ep + FlashAttention-3
blurb: Based on PR #596 (DeepQuant V10b) with FlashAttention-3. LoRA TTT: rank-8 Q/V + rank-16 LM-head, per-block bias tuning, per-document adaptation, batched 64 docs/GPU, Adam lr=0.01, 6 epochs, cosine LR, temp 0.98. Architecture: 10L 512d GQA 8/4, EMA 0.999, SWA, Late QAT, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048), compiled Muon, train_seq_len=1024.
